generated_oml:
instance LabGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp, moving pucks representing containers between locations."
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoSensorInterface, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based interface for collecting sensor data and controller states"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerStatesDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ControllerStatesDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib
]

instance ControllerStatesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controller states"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerStatesDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, ControllerStatesDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart movement control via stepper motor"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist movement control via stepper motor"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Container handling via electromagnet"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for gantry crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance ArcadiaModels : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia models for Model-Based Systems Engineering in Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4Model
]

instance DarTwinDocumentation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for documenting digital twin evolution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4Model
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService, GrafanaService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for gantry crane control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture description"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureService
]

instance TimescaleDBService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance GrafanaService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardNotificationsInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of gantry crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationBreachesInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionResultsInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionService
]

instance SystemArchitectureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System architecture description using C4 Model"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureDescriptionInsight
]

instance ValidationBreachesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation threshold breaches notification"
]

instance FaultDetectionResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection results from time series classification"
]

instance DashboardNotificationsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard notifications for system status"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data storage in TimescaleDB"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for gantry crane dynamics"
]

instance ArchitectureDescriptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System architecture description using C4 Model"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory command for gantry crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service executed by the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation performed at sensor sampling frequency (exact rate unspecified)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane connected via Python interface to Control Application and Logging Application; digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) integrated via MQTT broker and Docker containerization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as designed (CAD models), as manufactured (physical hardware), and as operated phases, with continuous validation during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs using distance metrics against predefined thresholds for model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for communication between DT services; physical interface uses Python to interact with crane controllers via unspecified serial communication protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker Compose to containerize database, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; gantrylib module installed via pip."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc approach using C4 Model for architecture and Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering; no industry standards explicitly followed."
]
